description_long: This object is a sleek, modern smartphone with a matte black finish and a large, flat touchscreen dominating the front surface. The display is currently on, showing a vivid purple flower wallpaper with no visible icons or notifications. The back of the phone is plain black, featuring a small camera lens and flash in the top left corner, with no visible branding or text. The edges are gently rounded, contributing to a comfortable grip, and the device appears to be constructed primarily from metal and glass. No external case or cover is present, and the phone's design is minimalist, with only subtle seams and buttons visible along the sides. The overall appearance is elegant and understated, suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A matte black smartphone with a large touchscreen displaying a purple flower wallpaper, featuring a minimalist design and a single rear camera.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large black touchscreen with a vivid purple flower wallpaper and a subtle front-facing camera.
description_view_1: Angled front-left view highlighting the slim profile, rounded edges, and the illuminated display.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain black back with a single camera and flash in the top left corner, no visible branding.
description_view_3: Angled rear-right view emphasizing the phone's thinness and the absence of buttons or logos on the back.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a vivid purple flower wallpaper centered on a black background, with no visible icons, widgets, or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: A single camera lens and flash are located in the top left corner on the back of the phone.
attribute_button_layout: A single round button is visible below the screen on the front; no other buttons are clearly visible from the provided views.
